'''âzh-zh-t''' ('''kazhazhat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cab|cab]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cab|cab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-zh-t
|-
! Lemma
| kazhazhat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhazhat|thizhazhat]] || [[word:jizhazhat|jizhazhat]] || [[word:shizhazhat|shizhazhat]] || [[word:kizhazhat|kizhazhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhazhat|thuthuzhazhat]] || [[word:jujuzhazhat|jujuzhazhat]] || [[word:shushuzhazhat|shushuzhazhat]] || [[word:kukuzhazhat|kukuzhazhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhazhat|thuzhazhat]] || [[word:juzhazhat|juzhazhat]] || [[word:shuzhazhat|shuzhazhat]] || [[word:kuzhazhat|kuzhazhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhazhat|thuzhazhat]] || [[word:juzhazhat|juzhazhat]] || [[word:shuzhazhat|shuzhazhat]] || [[word:kuzhazhat|kuzhazhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhazhat|thezhazhat]] || [[word:jezhazhat|jezhazhat]] || [[word:shezhazhat|shezhazhat]] || [[word:kezhazhat|kezhazhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhazhat|thothozhazhat]] || [[word:jojozhazhat|jojozhazhat]] || [[word:shoshozhazhat|shoshozhazhat]] || [[word:kokozhazhat|kokozhazhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhazhat|thozhazhat]] || [[word:jozhazhat|jozhazhat]] || [[word:shozhazhat|shozhazhat]] || [[word:kozhazhat|kozhazhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhazhat|thozhazhat]] || [[word:jozhazhat|jozhazhat]] || [[word:shozhazhat|shozhazhat]] || [[word:kozhazhat|kozhazhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhazhat|thĂŠzhazhat]] || [[word:jĂŠzhazhat|jĂŠzhazhat]] || [[word:shĂŠzhazhat|shĂŠzhazhat]] || [[word:kĂŠzhazhat|kĂŠzhazhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhazhat|thathazhazhat]] || [[word:jajazhazhat|jajazhazhat]] || [[word:shashazhazhat|shashazhazhat]] || [[word:kakazhazhat|kakazhazhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhazhat|thazhazhat]] || [[word:jazhazhat|jazhazhat]] || [[word:shazhazhat|shazhazhat]] || [[word:kazhazhat|kazhazhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhazhat|thazhazhat]] || [[word:jazhazhat|jazhazhat]] || [[word:shazhazhat|shazhazhat]] || [[word:kazhazhat|kazhazhat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhazhat|shazhazhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhazhat|goshazhazhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhazhat|gokishazhazhat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhatnĂŒ|shazhazhatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnknĂŒ|goshazhazhatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatnĂŒ|gokishazhazhatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhazhatshĂ«|shazhazhatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkshĂ«|goshazhazhatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatshĂ«|gokishazhazhatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhatro|shazhazhatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkro|goshazhazhatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatro|gokishazhazhatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhatmu|shazhazhatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkmu|goshazhazhatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatmu|gokishazhazhatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhazhatsher|shazhazhatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnksher|goshazhazhatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatsher|gokishazhazhatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhazhatng|shazhazhatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkng|goshazhazhatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatng|gokishazhazhatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhazhatya|shazhazhatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkya|goshazhazhatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatya|gokishazhazhatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhazhatyam|shazhazhatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkyam|goshazhazhatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatyam|gokishazhazhatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazhatnĂŒshĂ«|shazhazhatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhazhatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhazhatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhatnĂŒro|shazhazhatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnknĂŒro|goshazhazhatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatnĂŒro|gokishazhazhatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhatnĂŒmu|shazhazhatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnknĂŒmu|goshazhazhatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatnĂŒmu|gokishazhazhatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhatshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhazhatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhazhatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhazhatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhatshĂ«ro|shazhazhatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkshĂ«ro|goshazhazhatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatshĂ«ro|gokishazhazhatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhatshĂ«mu|shazhazhatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkshĂ«mu|goshazhazhatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatshĂ«mu|gokishazhazhatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhatronĂŒ|shazhazhatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkronĂŒ|goshazhazhatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatronĂŒ|gokishazhazhatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazhatroshĂ«|shazhazhatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkroshĂ«|goshazhazhatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatroshĂ«|gokishazhazhatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhatromu|shazhazhatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkromu|goshazhazhatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatromu|gokishazhazhatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhatmunĂŒ|shazhazhatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkmunĂŒ|goshazhazhatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatmunĂŒ|gokishazhazhatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazhatmushĂ«|shazhazhatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkmushĂ«|goshazhazhatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatmushĂ«|gokishazhazhatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhatmuro|shazhazhatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhatnkmuro|goshazhazhatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhatmuro|gokishazhazhatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
